name: vmetrix-qa-challenge
description: QA Automation Challenge | Playwright + TypeScript + Allure | UI & API Testing

scripts.test:ui: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/ui/
scripts.test:ui:standard: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='UI [standard]'
scripts.test:ui:problem: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='UI [problem]'
scripts.test:ui:performance: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='UI [performance_glitch]'
scripts.test:ui:error: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='UI [error]'
scripts.test:ui:visual: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='UI [visual]'
scripts.test:cart: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/ui/cart.spec.ts --project='UI [standard]'
scripts.test:checkout: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/ui/checkout.spec.ts --project='UI [standard]'
scripts.test:inventory: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test inventory.spec.ts --project='UI [standard]' --project='UI [error]' --project='UI [visual]'
scripts.test:api: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test --project='API Tests'
scripts.test:api:auth: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/api/auth.spec.ts --project='API Tests'
scripts.test:api:products: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/api/products.spec.ts --project='API Tests'
scripts.test:api:users: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test src/tests/api/users.spec.ts --project='API Tests'
scripts.test:all: npm run clean:results && npx playwright test
scripts.report: npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.test:report: npm run test:all; npm run report
